games.name: Blind Ranking Numbers
games.description: Place numbers in order without seeing them! Can you fill all 10 slots?
games.creator: Alex

games.name: Higher or Lower
games.description: Guess if the next hidden card is higher or lower than yours. Ace is low, King is high—how far can you go?
games.creator: Alex

games.name: Mimi's Memory Chess
games.description: Answer math questions, match colors, and win circles in this memory challenge!
games.creator: Mimi

games.name: Codebreaker
games.description: Guess the hidden color sequence—green means right place, orange means right color, wrong slot. 7 tries!
games.creator: Mimi

games.name: Blind Rank Daily Challenge
games.description: One Blind Ranking puzzle per day. Same for everyone—compete on the leaderboard.
games.creator: Jones Games

games.name: Higher or Lower Daily Challenge
games.description: Medium card run—same deal for everyone each day. Build your streak and climb the leaderboard.
games.creator: Jones Games

games.name: Codebreaker Daily Challenge
games.description: Medium code in 7 guesses—one secret per day for the whole world. Beat the clock.
games.creator: Jones Games
